case_title: SAKOVICH, VLADIMIR (VAL) L. VS HARGRAVES, PAMELA JANICE

REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLFT SAKOVICH, VLADIMIR IS DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE SENT TO PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.

OPPOSITION TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAKOVICH, VLADIMIR (VAL) L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARGRAVES, PAMELA JANICE SEE ACTION NOS. 768204 AND 768207. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
